scripts.dev: npm run build -w @tankes/shared && concurrently -n SHARED,SERVER,CLIENT -c cyan,green,magenta "npm run dev -w @tankes/shared" "npm run dev -w @tankes/server" "npm run dev -w @tankes/client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @tankes/shared && npm run build -w @tankes/server && npm run build -w @tankes/client
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @tankes/shared && npm run typecheck -w @tankes/server && npm run typecheck -w @tankes/client
scripts.test: npm run build -w @tankes/shared && npm run test -w @tankes/server
